newsSince: No material company-specific news since June 9. The continuing structural tailwind is Samsung/TSMC retreating from 200mm legacy capacity, which benefits DB HiTek's specialty 8-inch foundry, plus a planned SiC/GaN 200mm ramp in Q4 next year, but no new orders or guidance surfaced in the window.

sources.label: DB HiTek gains as Samsung/TSMC cut 8-inch

verdicts.rankRationale: AI-node lens: DB HiTek is a specialty 200mm foundry tollgate, only indirectly tied to AI compute (power/display ICs). No fresh orders or node catalyst since June 9; legacy-retreat tailwind is structural but not AI-bottleneck-direct. After 105% YTD the mid-rank fits; hold with no fundamental change.
verdicts.bull: Beneficiary of Samsung/TSMC 8-inch retreat; SiC/GaN power ramp coming.
verdicts.neutral: Specialty foundry tollgate; only indirect AI-node exposure.
verdicts.bear: Not advanced-node/HBM/CPO direct; 105% YTD already prices the legacy squeeze.
